title: Livi (Kry) - European Telemedicine Platform
problem: Access to GPs is limited by geography and wait times. Patients need convenient, fast access to medical advice and prescriptions.
solution: Video consultation platform connecting patients with GPs, psychologists, and specialists. Also operates physical clinics in Sweden and UK.
technology: Video platform, digital health records, EHR integration
traction_signals: Operating in Sweden, Norway, UK, France, Germany
Best financial results to date in 2024
regulatory_notes: Operating as licensed healthcare provider in each market.
varden_fit: Moderate — Livi competes with some Varden clinic partners. However, Livi's infrastructure approach (EHR integrations, booking) is directly relevant. Potential for collaboration or feature inspiration.
notes: Livi = Kry's brand outside Sweden/Nordics. Operating physical clinics alongside digital is notable trend.
